status.goal: Full song 2-3 min for streaming; 45-90s excerpt for vertical edit
status.targetDuration: 2-3 minutes (full, operator-tuned); excerpt for short video

fields.title: Cocoa Dome Midnight
fields.styleOfMusic: Velvety K-pop-inspired R&B pop with muted trap hats, warm sub-bass, glassy synth pads, and intimate close-mic vocals; verses stay breathy and tactile, pre-chorus lifts with stacked harmonies, chorus blooms glossy and addictive with finger snaps. Subtle ASMR ear candy: butter sizzle, dry kataifi crunch, sticky marshmallow pull, cocoa powder puff. Clean sensual mix, midnight kitchen sheen, no aggressive drops., r&b, pop, electronic
fields.excludeStyles: No aggressive rap, no metal, no heavy rock, no children's choir, no advertising voice-over, no real artist imitation, no brand names, no recipe-tutorial lyrics, no ingredient counting, no software names, no Dubai city tourism clichés.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics about a playful unicorn chef making viral Dubai chewy cookies: toasted kataifi crunch, pistachio cream filling, and a chocolate marshmallow shell dusted in cocoa. Use only lyrics and section tags; do not explain the prompt. Do not include genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-style instructions. Do not write a recipe tutorial, quantities, numbered steps, brand names, or social media references.

Mood: intimate, luxurious, chewy, crunchy, pistachio-bright, cocoa-matte, food-video ASMR energy, seductive but clean.

Lyric style: short singable lines, clipped phrasing, catchy repetitions, call-and-response energy, simple hooks, occasional parenthetical echoes like "(cocoa dome)" or "(green inside)". Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.

Story and imagery to weave in naturally:
- kataifi threads turning gold in butter foam, brittle crunch toss
- pistachio cream flood, emerald filling scoops, cold firm domes
- marshmallow melt stretch, cocoa cloud whisk, glossy chocolate sheet
- oiled glove wrap, pinch and roll, matte cocoa dust
- warm knife reveal, green pistachio heart, chewy brown shell
- six domed cookies on the Licorn island, satisfied glow

Must include naturally: Dubai chewy cookie, kataifi crunch, pistachio cream, cocoa dome, marshmallow chew, green inside, unicorn, Licorn kitchen.

Structure:
[Verse 1]
Gold threads, butter dreams, midnight pan glow.

[Pre-Chorus]
Green scoops wait; chocolate stretch begins.

[Chorus]
Chantable hook around cocoa dome, pistachio heart, chewy love, crunch and pull.

[Verse 2]
Cocoa dust, sealed sphere, crisp secret center.

[Bridge]
Softer breath: halved reveal, green gold inside, still hero tray.

[Final Chorus]
Repeat chorus with richer harmony and six cookies still on the counter.
fields.shortVersionPlan: Open on Verse 1 kataifi sizzle and crunch synced to segment-01, pre-chorus into pistachio scoop (segment-02) and marshmallow stretch (segment-03), chorus over wrap and cocoa dust (segments 04-05), tag the motionless six-cookie hero from segment-06 before the Licorn outro. Keep chorus hook under 15 seconds for TikTok/Reels.

instructions.voice: Breathy intimate lead with warm doubles on chorus; playful not explicit.
instructions.structure: Chorus must survive a 45-90s vertical cut over cross-section reveal and hero lock.
instructions.workflowNotes: Suno is manual. Paste fields into Suno Custom Mode.

autoLyricsPrompt: Opening line: change "Write original English song lyrics" to "Write original 2-3 minutes English song lyrics".
Lyric style line: after "Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.", add ", but make a 2-3 minutes song".
Structure header: change "Structure:" to "Extend this structure to fit a 2-3 minutes song:"

qualityChecks: Title avoids protected brands and artists.
Style of Music has no 2-3 minutes suffix in agent baseline.
Auto Lyrics Prompt is English, uses baseline opener, and ends lyric style with the 45-90 second video edit clause.
Short version aligns with Seedance food-porn and hero beats.
No music requested in Seedance prompts.
